answer:
The three prisms are attached along their rectangular faces, so those internal faces are no longer part of the surface. Each prism originally has 5 faces (2 triangular ends and 3 rectangular sides). With three prisms, that totals 15 faces, but attaching them removes 2 rectangular faces per connection (two connections total), removing 4 faces. The remaining 11 faces are reduced further because some co-planar rectangular faces merge into single larger faces, resulting in a final count of 6 faces.

\boxed{B}
